OPPOSITION TO ALLIED INTERSTATE INC'S. DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILLIES, GRAHAM

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT ALLIED INTERSTATE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 8 BECAUSE IT IS EITHER PREEMPTED OR THE CONDUCT IS NON-NEGLIGENT, SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 6 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLEADED THAT DEFENDANT KNEW NO DEBT WAS OWED AND SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLIED INTERSTATE, INC. HEARING SET FOR MAY-12-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
OPPOSITION TO DIRECTTV GROUP INC'S. DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GILLIES, GRAHAM

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT DIRECT TV, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 THROUGH 4 AND 8, BOTH BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED MALICE AND BECAUSE THE CLAIMS ARE PREMISED ON PUBLICATION TO ALLIED NOT JUST THE CREDIT AGENCIES, OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 6 BECAUSE PARAGRAPHS 12 AND 13 ADEQUATELY ALLEGED DEFENDANT'S PRIOR KNOWLEDGE GIVEN WHICH OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED AND SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-12-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: ATTY. JOSEPH P. BRENT OF THE THE BRENT FIRM, TEL. 984-0415, FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DAMIEN P. LILLIS OF THE DAVIS LAW FIRM, TEL. 278-1416, FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY ALLIED INTERSTATE, INC.

RULING: A R G U E D. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ALLIED INTERSTATE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 8 BECAUSE IT IS EITHER PREEMPTED OR THE CONDUCT IS NON-NEGLIGENT, SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 6 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLEADED THAT DEFENDANT KNEW NO DEBT WAS OWED AND SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/PM
